title: 10 best herbal tinctures for ringworm
description: Tea tree tinctures helps with ringworm because of its potent antifungal properties, which allow it to effectively target and combat the fungal infection. The tannins and terpenoids present in tea tree oil have been shown to inhibit the growth and reproduction of fungi, making it an ideal natural remedy for ringworm treatment.
